Conan Exiles Character Planner by The Archivist

Rebuilt from uploaded Conan exports. Character Summary shows final results; Advanced Build View shows the detailed breakdown. Gear and Feats feed into both views.

Character Portrait

Recommended portrait size: 512 × 512 px, square image. Images up to 5 MB are accepted directly; 5–25 MB images are compressed automatically for export.

Equipment

Selections here update the Gear section and stats on the Build tab.

Gear sets are generated automatically by matching armor names across Head, Chest, Hands, Legs, and Feet.
Select equipment to see stats.

Active Buffs

These come from item modifier values in the uploaded ItemTable. Use multiple slots to stack planned food/elixir/fish effects manually.

Notes

Save / Load

Unofficial fan-made planner. Calculated player attribute totals use editable in-script formulas based on common Conan Exiles attribute rules; selected weapon damage is an estimate before target armor, perks with conditional effects, thrall crafting bonuses, and server/mod changes.
